prompts.name: Ocean Shore
prompts.text: Place the scene at the ocean shore with waves, foam, wet sand, and open coastal light.

prompts.name: Calm Lake
prompts.text: Place the scene beside a calm lake with reflections, gentle ripples, and peaceful natural depth.

prompts.name: River Crossing
prompts.text: Place the scene near a river crossing with stones, flowing water, plants, and soft natural sound implied.

prompts.name: Rain Puddles
prompts.text: Add rain puddles with reflections, ripples, and wet ground detail.

prompts.name: Hot Spring
prompts.text: Place the scene near a hot spring with steam, stones, warm water, and serene atmosphere.

prompts.name: Fountain
prompts.text: Add a fountain with flowing water, stone or metal detail, droplets, and refined public-space atmosphere.

prompts.name: Underwater View
prompts.text: Create an underwater view with blue filtered light, drifting particles, fish, and soft aquatic movement.

prompts.name: Waterfall Pool
prompts.text: Place the scene near a waterfall pool with mist, rocks, rushing water, and lush surroundings.

prompts.name: Boat on Lake
prompts.text: Add a small boat on a lake with reflections, gentle water movement, and quiet travel mood.

prompts.name: Harbor Dock
prompts.text: Place the scene on a harbor dock with boats, ropes, wooden boards, and maritime atmosphere.

prompts.name: Rain on Glass
prompts.text: Add rain on glass with streaking droplets, soft outside blur, and cozy indoor contrast.

prompts.name: Reflecting Pool
prompts.text: Add a reflecting pool with still water, mirrored architecture or sky, and elegant calm.

prompts.name: Forest Stream
prompts.text: Place the scene by a forest stream with stones, moss, filtered light, and gentle motion.

prompts.name: Moonlit Waves
prompts.text: Use moonlit waves with silver highlights, dark blue water, and quiet nighttime beauty.

prompts.name: Flooded Street
prompts.text: Create a shallow flooded street with reflections, rain mood, and controlled urban atmosphere.
